{
  OuterActivator.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class OuterActivatorRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register() =>
        GeneratedActivators.Register<global::Outer>(Create);

    static global::Outer Create(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> values)
    {
        var instance = new global::Outer();
        if (values.TryGetValue("Name", out var sv0)) instance.Name = (string)sv0!;
        if (values.TryGetValue("Nested", out var sv1)) instance.Nested = (global::Inner)sv1!;
        return instance;
    }
},
  OuterSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class OuterSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> NameColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Outer, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

    public static void NameHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Outer, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Func<global::Outer, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Func<global::Outer, FormulaContext<global::Outer>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Outer>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> DetailColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Outer, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Nested.Detail, configuration);

    public static void DetailHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Outer, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Nested.Detail);

    public static void DetailRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Func<global::Outer, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Func<global::Outer, FormulaContext<global::Outer>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Outer>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Nested.Detail);

    public static void DetailInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Nested.Detail, value);

    public static void DetailExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Outer> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Nested.Detail);
}

}
